message:
fix(wasm): disable fast array direct access on WASM32

Disable getFastArrayDirect on WASM32 because the JSObject struct layout
may not match QuickJS internals when compiled for WASM32.

This prevents "out of bounds memory access" errors for some benchmarks.
The fallback path uses standard FFI calls which are slower but work correctly.

Tested:
- Simple JS: works in WASM
- Arrays with loops: works in WASM
- Large arrays (100k items, 1000 runs): works in WASM (379x slower than native)
- Complex benchmarks (loop.js): still crashes due to runtime bundle complexity
